sanitizers.expression: wp_kses_post(__('Please rate %1$s %2$s on %3$s to help us spread the word. Thank you!', 'siteseo'))

wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('You cannot uncheck a checkbox? This is normal, and it\'s most likely defined in the global settings of the plugin.', 'siteseo'), esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=siteseo-titles#tab=tab_siteseo_titles_single'))))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('If your site is already verified in %1$s Google Search Console %2$s, you can leave this field blank.', 'siteseo'), '', ''))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('If your site is already verified in %1$s Bing Webmaster Tools %2$s, you can leave this field blank.', 'siteseo'), '', ''))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('%1$s Note : %2$s This feature applies only to cookies added through SiteSEO analytics and tracking.', 'siteseo'), '', ''))

wp_kses_post('

Enter only the host without quotes, such as "example.matomo.cloud"
(Cloud) or "matomo.example.com" (self-hosted).

')

wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('To find your site ID, visit your %1$s Matomo Cloud %2$s account, go to Websites, and click Manage. The
"Site ID" will be displayed on the right side.', 'siteseo'), '', ''))

wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('For self-hosted installations, navigate to your Matomo administration, then go to Settings, Websites, %1$s and Manage. From the list of websites, locate the "ID" line.', 'siteseo'), '
'))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('Create your first Microsoft Clarity project %1$shere%2$s.', 'siteseo'), '', ''))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('Setup your Google / Bing API keys from the %1$s Settings %2$s tab', 'siteseo'), '', ''))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('%1$s Enter the URLs %2$s you want to index in the field below.', 'siteseo'), '', ''))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('Click %1$s Submit URLs to Google & Bing %2$s', 'siteseo'), '', ''))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('To view your sitemap, %1$s enable permalinks %2$s (other than the default one) and save the settings to flush them.', 'siteseo'), '', ''))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('Insert the HTML sitemap block via the %1$s Block Editor %2$s.', 'siteseo'), '', ''))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('We generate the %1$s og:image %2$s meta in the following order:', 'siteseo'), '', ''))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('We generate the %1$s OG:image %2$s meta in the following sequence:', 'siteseo'), '', ''))
wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('Please define a default %1$s OG image %2$s using the field above.', 'siteseo'), '',''))
wp_kses_post(__('The data shown here is only a sample from Google Analytics how SiteSEO will display your site\'s analytics once connected.', 'siteseo'))

wp_kses_post(__('Connected to Google Search Console. If this is your first time connecting the site and data doesn’t appear yet, please wait—Google may take a few days to populate the data. You can also try refreshing.', 'siteseo'))

wp_kses_post(sprintf(__('A static page is set as your site front page (%s Dashboard > Settings > Reading). To add an SEO title, description, and meta tags for the homepage, please click here -', 'siteseo'), !defined('SITEPAD') ? 'WP' : 'Sitepad'))

wp_kses_post('

Check also the"Search engine visibility" setting from the WordPress Reading page

')
wp_kses_post('Do not display author archives in search engine results (noindex)')
wp_kses_post('Do not display date archives in search engine results (noindex)')
wp_kses_post('Do not display date archives in search engine results (noindex)')
wp_kses_post('Do not display author archives in search engine results (noindex)')
wp_kses_post(__('Do not follow links for this taxonomy archive(nofollow)', 'siteseo'))
wp_kses_post(__('Do not display this single post type in search engine results (noindex)', 'siteseo'))
wp_kses_post(__('This custom post type is NOT excluded from your XML sitemaps despite the fact that it is set to NOINDEX.', 'siteseo'))
wp_kses_post(__('Do not follow links for this single post type nofollow', 'siteseo'))
wp_kses_post(__('Do not display this taxonomy archive in search engine results(noindex)', 'siteseo'))
wp_kses_post(__('This custom taxonomy is NOT excluded from your XML sitemaps despite the fact that it is set to NOINDEX. We recommend that you check this out.', 'siteseo'))
